tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_evaporation module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_evaporation.test_determine_maximum_soil_evaporation(soil_evaporation_adj, snow_water_content)

Tests that evaporate() evaporates the correct amount of water from the soil profile, and stores that amount properly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_infiltration.test_infiltrate(rainfall: float, is_top_frozen: bool, expected_runoff: float, expected_infiltration: float, expected_total_runoff: float) → None

Test that infiltrate() correctly stores all values in SoilData object and calls all the methods it should.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_acceptable_percolation_amount(water_content: float, saturation_content: float) → None

Test that acceptable_percolation_amount() in LayerData correctly calculates the maximum amount of water that can be percolated into it

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_add_phosphorus_to_pool(pool: float, added_phosphorus: float, area: float) → None

Tests that this method correctly calculates the new value of the soil phosphorus pool being added to.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_add_to_active_phosphorus(added_phosphorus: float, initial_active_phosphorus: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that the stable phosphorus content of the top soil layer has phosphorus correctly added to it.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_add_to_labile_phosphorus(added_phosphorus: float, initial_labile_phosphorus: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that the labile phosphorus content of the top soil layer has phosphorus correctly added to it.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_calculate_phosphorus_sorption_parameter(clay: float, phosphorus: float, carbon: float) → None

Tests the that the phosphorus sorption parameter is calculated properly based on the clay, labile inorganic phosphorus, and carbon contents of the soil.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_depth_of_layer_center(top: float, bottom: float) → None

Test that depth_of_layer_center() in LayerData correctly determine the center depth

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_determine_soil_nutrient_area_density(phosphorus: float, density: float, thickness: float, field_size: float) → None

Tests that the conversion from mg / kg soil to kg / ha is performed correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_determine_soil_nutrient_concentration(nutrient: float, density: float, depth: float, area: float) → None

Tests that the soil nutrient concentration is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_excess_water_available(water_content: float, field_capacity_content: float) → None

Test that excess_water_available() in LayerData correctly calculates the amount of excess water available in a layer

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_field_capacity_content(top: float, bottom: float, field_concentration: float) → None

Test that field_capacity_content() in LayerData correctly calculates the field water content of the layer

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_initialize_carbon_pools(field_size: float, top_depth: int, expected_active: float, expected_passive: float, expected_slow: float, expected_structural_litter: float, expected_metabolic_litter: float, residue: float) → None

Tests that carbon pools in a soil layer are properly initialized.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_layer_thickness(top: float, bottom: float) → None

Test that the layer_thickness() in LayerData works as expected

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_layer_thickness_error(top: float, bottom: float) → None

Test that layer_thickness() in LayerData throws errors when given invalid data

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_nutrient_cycling_temp_factor(temp: float) → None

Tests the nutrient cycling temperature factor is correctly calculated as a property of LayerData.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_nutrient_cycling_water_factor(water_content: float, field_capacity: float) → float

Tests that the nutrient cycling water factor is correctly calculated as a property of LayerData.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_percent_organic_matter_proportion(percent_organic_carbon_proportion: float) → None

Test that percent_organic_matter_proportion() in LayerData correctly calculates the percent of organic matter content in a layer of soil

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_post_init(top: float, bottom: float, concentration: float) → None

Test that __post_init__() runs and correctly initializes attributes in LayerData

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_saturation_content(saturation_concentration: float, layer_thickness: float) → None

Test that saturation_content() in LayerData calculates the saturation content of a soil layer correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_water_factor(water_content: float, field_capacity_content: float, wilting_point_content: float, saturation_content: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that water factor was calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_layer_data.test_wilting_point_content(top: float, bottom: float, wilt_concentration: float) → None

Test that wilting_point_content() in LayerData calculates the wilting point content correctly

test that _determine_percolation_travel_time() correctly raises errors when invalid input is passed

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_percolation.test_percolate(can_percolate: bool, seasonal_high_water_table: bool, infiltration: float, excessive_infiltration: bool, expected: List[float], mock_soil_data: SoilData) → None

Tests the main routine of percolation.py and check that it updates all values correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_percolation.test_percolate_between_layers(time_step: float, excess_water_available: float, amount_to_percolate: float, acceptable_percolation_amount: float, expected: float) → None

this function tests _percolate_between_layers() in Percolation.py

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_percolation.test_percolate_excess_water(infiltration: float, water_contents: list[float], acceptable_percolation_amounts: list[float], percolated_water: list[float], expected_water_contents: list[float]) → None

Tests that extreme levels of infiltration are handled correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_annual_reset() → None

Test that annual_reset() actually resets the values it should

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_cover_factor(cover_type: str) → None

Test that the cover factor method returns the correct value for each time or else gives the right error

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_error_manual_soil_data_configuration() → None

Test that an error is correctly raised when an invalid input is used to create SoilData object.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_get_vectorized_layer_attribute() → None

ensures that layer data can be vectorized.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_manual_soil_data_configuration() → None

Test that creating a custom SoilData object actually has all the correct values in its fields

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_bulk_density(layers: List[LayerData]) → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates average bulk density of soil profile, weighted by layer thickness

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_field_capacity() → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates the amount of water in the soil profile when at field capacity

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_nitrates_total(layers: List[LayerData]) → None

Test that SoilData correctly sums nitrates contained in soil profile

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_saturation() → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates the amount of water in soil profile when completely saturated

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_profile_soil_water_content() → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates amount of water in the entire soil profile

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_set_vectorized_layer_attribute() → None

ensures that layer attributes are properly set

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_soil_data_post_init_error() → None

Test that the correct errors were thrown when incorrect values were used in post init

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_data.test_soil_water_factor(profile_water: float, profile_field_capacity: float, expected: float) → None

Test that SoilData correctly calculates the soil water factor for a soil profile.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_half_hour_rainfall_fraction(rainfall: float) → None

Tests that the maximum half-hour rainfall fraction is calculated correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_high_sand_factor(sand: float) → None

Tests _determine_high_sand_factor() in soil_erosion.py

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_peak_runoff_rate(runoff: float, rainfall: float, length: float, manning: float, average: float, area: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that the peak runoff rate is determined correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_rainfall_intensity(rainfall: float, length: float, manning: float, average: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that the rainfall intensity is calculated accurately.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_runoff_coefficient(runoff: float, rainfall: float, expected: float) → None

Tests that the correct runoff coefficient is calculated.

Tests _determine_sediment_yield() in soil_erosion.py

Tests _determine_soil_erodibility_factor() in soil_erosion.py

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_support_practice_factor() → None

Test that the support factor is returned correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_time_of_concentration(slope: float, manning: float, average_slope: float) → None

Tests that the time of concentration is determined correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_determine_topographic_factor(length: float, avg_slope: float) → None

Tests _determine_topographic_factor() in soil_erosion.py

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_erode(field_size: float, min_cover_factor: float, residue: float, rainfall: float, should_fail: bool, accumulated_runoff: float) → None

Tests that erode() properly calls methods and stores values

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_error_clay_silt_ratio_factor(silt: float, clay: float) → None

Tests that _determine_clay_silt_ratio_factor() in soil_erosion.py correctly raises an error when invalid input is given

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_error_determine_cover_management_factor(min_cover: float, residue: float) → None

Tests that _determine_cover_management_factor() correctly raises error for invalid inputs

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.test_soil_erosion.test_fraction_rainfall_during_time_of_concentration(concentration: float, rainfall_frac: float) → None

Tests that the fraction of rainfall that fell during the time of concentration is calculated correctly.
